name: Glycine Sleep Use
summary: Glycine has limited-moderate evidence for subjective sleep quality improvements at bedtime.
description: Glycine used for sleep is framed by mechanistic data on inhibitory neurotransmission and thermoregulation, with human effects dependent on dosing/timing context.
safetyNotes: Safety notes are not source-complete in this workbook row; avoid broad safety claims and hold for interaction, population, and formulation review.
